# jellyfin_user (Data Source)

Looks up a Jellyfin user by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_user" "admin" {
  name = "admin"
}

output "admin_id" {
  value = data.jellyfin_user.admin.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enable_all_folders` (Boolean) Whether the user has access to all folders.
- `id` (String) The unique user identifier.
- `is_administrator` (Boolean) Whether the user is an administrator.
- `is_disabled` (Boolean) Whether the user is disabled.
